text_template: Getting your music out in the world doesn't have to be complicated. With DistroKid, you upload your track, you upload your album, whatever it may be, and it shows up everywhere that people listen, on every major streaming and social platform, you name it, it gets out there. Here's the part that every artist loves. You get to keep 100% of your royalties. Unlimited uploads, no hidden catches. It's how independent artists are putting out music faster than ever and actually getting paid for it. I use DistroKid myself. It's simple, reliable, and it just works. So if you got music that's ready to be heard, don't let it sit on your hard drive. Get it streaming everywhere today with DistroKid.
